mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_list_entry ( price_list_number,FMaterialId,FMaterialName,F_cty_BaseProperty,F_GCHH, FPrice,F_GGSM,FNote, FTaxPrice, FUnitID, FTaxRate, F100t5, FPriceCoefficient, FUpPrice, FDownPrice, FEntryEffectiveDate, FEntryExpiryDate, F_WBZC, F_WBZK, F_WBZG, F_WBZTJ, F_WBZSL, F_WBZDW, F_MZ, F_JZ, F_bzsm, FRECENTDATE, F_cgshys, F_dzshqdl, F_ZXSMS, F_ZXSMSTP, F_BCGG, F_kppm, Fxjr, Fsfyyywxj, Fcpzlyq, F_QDL,created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{priceListNumber},#{FMaterialId},#{FMaterialName}, #{F_cty_BaseProperty},#{F_GCHH},#{FPrice},#{F_GGSM}, #{FNote}, #{FTaxPrice}, #{FUnitID}, #{FTaxRate}, #{F100t5}, #{FPriceCoefficient}, #{FUpPrice}, #{FDownPrice}, #{FEntryEffectiveDate}, #{FEntryExpiryDate}, #{F_WBZC}, #{F_WBZK}, #{F_WBZG}, #{F_WBZTJ}, #{F_WBZSL}, #{F_WBZDW}, #{F_MZ}, #{F_JZ}, #{F_bzsm}, #{FRECENTDATE}, #{F_cgshys}, #{F_dzshqdl}, #{F_ZXSMS}, #{F_ZXSMSTP}, #{F_BCGG}, #{F_kppm}, #{Fxjr}, #{Fsfyyywxj}, #{Fcpzlyq}, #{F_QDL}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO price_list_entry ( price_list_number,FMaterialId,FMaterialName,F_cty_BaseProperty,F_GCHH, FPrice,F_GGSM,FNote, FTaxPrice, FUnitID, FTaxRate, F100t5, FPriceCoefficient, FUpPrice, FDownPrice, FEntryEffectiveDate, FEntryExpiryDate, F_WBZC, F_WBZK, F_WBZG, F_WBZTJ, F_WBZSL, F_WBZDW, F_MZ, F_JZ, F_bzsm, FRECENTDATE, F_cgshys, F_dzshqdl, F_ZXSMS, F_ZXSMSTP, F_BCGG, F_kppm, Fxjr, Fsfyyywxj, Fcpzlyq, F_QDL, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{entry.priceListNumber}, #{entry.FMaterialId}NULL, #{entry.FMaterialName}NULL, #{entry.F_cty_BaseProperty}NULL, #{entry.F_GCHH}NULL, #{entry.FPrice}NULL, #{entry.F_GGSM}NULL, #{entry.FNote}NULL, #{entry.FTaxPrice}NULL, #{entry.FUnitID}NULL, #{entry.FTaxRate}NULL, #{entry.F100t5}NULL, #{entry.FPriceCoefficient}NULL, #{entry.FUpPrice}NULL, #{entry.FDownPrice}NULL, #{entry.FEntryEffectiveDate}NULL, #{entry.FEntryExpiryDate}NULL, #{entry.F_WBZC}NULL, #{entry.F_WBZK}NULL, #{entry.F_WBZG}NULL, #{entry.F_WBZTJ}NULL, #{entry.F_WBZSL}NULL, #{entry.F_WBZDW}NULL, #{entry.F_MZ}NULL, #{entry.F_JZ}NULL, #{entry.F_bzsm}NULL, #{entry.FRECENTDATE}NULL, #{entry.F_cgshys}NULL, #{entry.F_dzshqdl}NULL, #{entry.F_ZXSMS}NULL, #{entry.F_ZXSMSTP}NULL, #{entry.F_BCGG}NULL, #{entry.F_kppm}NULL, #{entry.Fxjr}NULL, #{entry.Fsfyyywxj}NULL, #{entry.Fcpzlyq}NULL, #{entry.F_QDL}NULL, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ple.id,ple.price_list_number, b.number as FMaterialId,ple.FMaterialName,ple.F_GGSM,ple.FEntryEffectiveDate, ple.FEntryExpiryDate,ple.F_WBZC,ple.F_WBZK,ple.F_WBZG,ple.F_MZ,ple.F_JZ,ple.F_bzsm,ple.F_GCHH,ple.FTaxPrice,ple.F_QDL,ple.F_WBZDW,ple.FRECENTDATE,ple.F_ZXSMS,ple.Fsfyyywxj, ple.F_WBZSL,ple.FPrice,bd.`code` as FUnitID,ple.F_BCGG,ple.F_WBZTJ,ple.F_TP1 FROM price_list_entry ple LEFT JOIN by_material b ON ple.FMaterialId = b.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON ple.FUnitID = bd.kingdee ple.FEntryExpiryDate,ple.F_WBZC,ple.F_WBZK,ple.F_WBZG,ple.F_MZ,ple.F_JZ,ple.F_bzsm,ple.F_GCHH,ple.FTaxPrice,ple.F_QDL,bds.name as F_WBZDW,ple.FRECENTDATE,ple.F_ZXSMS,ple.Fsfyyywxj,ple.F_TP1, ple.F_WBZSL,ple.FPrice,bd.`code` as FUnitID,ple.F_BCGG,ple.F_WBZTJ FROM price_list_entry ple LEFT JOIN by_material b ON ple.FMaterialId = b.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON ple.FUnitID = bd.kingdee LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bds ON ple.F_WBZDW = bds.kingdee WHERE ple.price_list_number = #{priceListNumber} ORDER BY ple.created_at ASC

SELECT pe.price_list_number, bm.number as FMaterialId, pe.FMaterialName, pe.F_cty_BaseProperty, pe.F_GCHH, pe.FPrice, pe.F_GGSM, pe.FNote, pe.FTaxPrice, bd.name as FUnitID, pe.FTaxRate, pe.F100t5, pe.FPriceCoefficient, pe.FUpPrice, pe.FDownPrice, pe.FEntryEffectiveDate, pe.FEntryExpiryDate, pe.F_WBZC, pe.F_WBZK, pe.F_WBZG, pe.F_WBZTJ, pe.F_WBZSL, bdy.name as F_WBZDW, pe.F_MZ, pe.F_JZ, pe.F_bzsm, pe.FRECENTDATE, pe.F_cgshys, pe.F_dzshqdl, pe.F_ZXSMS, pe.F_ZXSMSTP, pe.F_BCGG, pe.F_kppm, pe.Fxjr, pe.Fsfyyywxj, pe.Fcpzlyq, pe.F_QDL, pe.created_at AS createdAt, pe.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM price_list_entry pe LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on pe.FUnitID=bd.kingdee and bd.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy on pe.F_WBZDW=bd.kingdee and bdy.category='unit' LEFT JOIN by_material bm on pe.FMaterialId=bm.k3_id WHERE pe.FMaterialId = #{FMaterialId} ORDER BY pe.id ASC
